mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO festival ( festival_title, add1, add2, map_x, map_y, event_startdate, event_enddate, first_image, tel, telname, overview, content_id ) VALUES
(#{f.festivalTitle}, #{f.add1}, #{f.add2}, #{f.mapX}, #{f.mapY}, #{f.eventStartdate}, #{f.eventEnddate}, #{f.firstImage}, #{f.tel}, #{f.telName}, #{f.overview}, #{f.contentId})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE festival_title = VALUES(festival_title), add1 = VALUES(add1), add2 = VALUES(add2), map_x = VALUES(map_x), map_y = VALUES(map_y), event_startdate= VALUES(event_startdate), event_enddate = VALUES(event_enddate), first_image = VALUES(first_image), tel = VALUES(tel), telname = VALUES(telname), overview = VALUES(overview)
mapper.select: select festival_id, festival_title, add1, add2, event_startdate, event_enddate, first_image from festival
select festival_title, add1, add2, map_x, map_y, event_startdate, event_enddate, first_image, tel, telname, overview from festival where festival_id=#{festivalId}
